summary:
DOMESTIC TERRORISM ARRESTS AND SECURITY MEASURES: Brandon discusses recent news regarding a Texas man, John Michael Garza Jr., who was arrested for attempting to provide bomb-making materials to an undercover FBI agent posing as an ISIS member. Brandon notes that federal charges were filed after the man shared pro-ISIS content and instructional bomb-making videos over several months. Brandon highlights heightened security measures for New Year's Eve in Times Square, New York, which include a double layer of screening to prevent potential vehicle rammings. Brandon also mentions that Mayor-elect Zohran Mamdani plans to take his oath of office underground in an abandoned 1904 subway station, a move interpreted as an infrastructure-focused statement but which Brandon links to safety concerns. Additionally, Brandon points out the deployment of the National Guard to New Orleans for New Year's Eve preparations.

ALLEGATIONS OF FINANCIAL FRAUD AND POLITICAL CORRUPTION: Brandon highlights a statement from Elon Musk regarding massive fraud within government-funded non-governmental organizations. According to the referenced tweet, the fraud could amount to 20 percent of the federal budget, totaling approximately 1.5 trillion dollars annually. Brandon also addresses accusations against Representative Ilhan Omar, citing claims that she smuggled 30 million dollars into a fake winery account. Brandon points out the discrepancy between her financial status upon taking office, which included significant student debt, and her current reported net worth.

GEOPOLITICAL PREDICTIONS AND MILITARY CONFLICTS: Brandon shares a prophetic vision concerning international conflicts, specifically predicting that China will seize Taiwan within three days while the United States is internally preoccupied with domestic issues and drama from the Biden administration. Brandon states that adversaries are waiting for America to be wounded before striking. Furthermore, Brandon recounts a vision of Ezekiel 38 and 39 coming to pass, involving an attack on Israel. Brandon emphasizes the importance of Donald Trump's presence during these events and calls for continued prayer for his safety and security.

DOMESTIC INFRASTRUCTURE THREATS AND PLAGUE VISIONS: Brandon recounts visions of a coming plague described as a black mist or black gauze moving across the land, comparing it to the death angel from the time of Moses. Brandon states that this plague will bring a major shaking and humbling to the United States over the next three years, though it will not be a fatal wound to the nation. Brandon mentions that adversaries, including Iran, are not only targeting major crown jewel cities like New York and Washington D.C., but have also infiltrated heartland cities such as Albuquerque, San Antonio, Oklahoma City, Kansas, and Seattle.

THE REMNANT AND MODERN PROPHETIC WARNINGS: Brandon outlines a message to the remnant Church, stating that they will be sheltered in the cleft of the rock and supernaturally provided for during the coming shaking. Brandon contrasts this group with those in the church who are described as lukewarm or stiff-necked. Brandon conveys a warning to modern prophetic voices, comparing them to the false prophets of Jeremiah's time who spoke only what the people wanted to hear. Brandon emphasizes the necessity of delivering difficult warnings about the upcoming acceleration of events and the need for the church to awaken.

HISTORICAL ANECDOTES AND THE GREAT DEPRESSION: Brandon shares family history regarding the Great Depression, noting how it severely affected his grandmother's habits for the rest of her life, such as saving tinfoil and taking only sponge baths to conserve water. Brandon mentions that his family survived by eating possum and black crow pie and making clothes from flour sacks. Brandon connects these historical survival stories to a warning about another impending economic depression.
rawData: [December 31, 2025]-[Come pray with us goodbye 2025 hello 2026]-[https://youtu.be/0jRKxZJW2x4]-[Good evening, family. Thank you for joining us again today. I know it's later. It's on purpose. There's things that I've had going on today. And the Lord visited today and there was a lot that he said. I told D whenever the Lord visits and he gives us a word as strong as he did today, in those moments, I fear him. There's awe. But it's just Jesus. And I want always to tell you we go vertical here. We have this treasure in earthen vessels that the excellency of the power is known of him and is not of us. He could have used anybody, and we're just grateful he looked at us. So, let's go to what you're about to see in the news. It is pretty shocking for what we've been telling you is coming by the Spirit of God. Ready? Article 1B: Texas man charged with trying to provide bomb materials to ISIS. He was an FBI agent. He got busted. All to the glory of God. Isn't that amazing? So, can you scroll up, son? Because they can't see the guy with the outfit on. Yeah, right there. So, he has all this stuff and he's trying to do... This is Texas today, from what I understand. So, a man is plotting to do mass chaos in Texas. So, we're praying over this number two. Go ahead. Federal agents have arrested a Texas man for allegedly trying to help ISIS. The newly uncovered plot comes as DHS issues a warning urging people to remain vigilant during their New Year's Eve celebrations. Fox News team coverage now; David Spunt has more on the Trump administration's plan to step up security. But we begin with Brooke Taylor live in Dallas on this Texas terror arrest. Brooke. 'Hi, Jackie. Well, federal charges have been filed against this ISIS sympathizer here in Texas. He's charged with trying to give bomb-making materials to an undercover FBI agent who was posing as an ISIS member. This investigation started back in October when an undercover NYPD officer flagged a social media account belonging to John Michael Garza Jr. The account followed several pro-ISIS pages and commented on ISIS posts. The undercover officer started talking with Garza, who described himself as a 21-year-old Mexican-American living in Texas. Over the course of two months, Garza sent ISIS media releases to the undercover agent, including videos of suicide bombings and instructional bomb-making videos. Prosecutors say he also sent small amounts of cryptocurrency to the agent, believing those funds would be used to buy guns and support ISIS. Last Monday, Garza agreed to meet a second person that he believed was an ISIS brother, but was really that FBI undercover agent. He allegedly handed over bomb materials to the agent and explained how to mix the chemicals. He was arrested shortly after that meeting and now faces a maximum of 20 years behind bars if he's convicted.' Attorney General Pam Bondi sharing this statement: 'ISIS's poisonous ideology must be ripped out root and stem. Anyone who tries to commit violence on ISIS's behalf will be found, arrested, and prosecuted. You cannot hide from us.' And FBI director Kash Patel also said, 'Let this case serve as a reminder to anyone planning to attack the United States on behalf of a terrorist organization. You will be brought to justice.' Jackie, all glory to Jesus for that, ladies and gentlemen. Another one down. Another crazy, but it's Dallas. Like, we've prayed over Dallas. Isn't that interesting? Okay, now we have another one that was caught. Lone actors and groups driven by ideology are the most significant terrorism threat to New Year celebrations, report says. Yeah, so they're concerned about it. Security preparations are underway ahead of New Year's Eve celebration in Times Square. Even greater security preparations. Never has there ever been two layers of security on New Year's Eve for the celebration, the countdown, and all the things that are going on. I want you to see what they're doing in New Year's. This is, I believe, a result of prayer. So if there isn't a threat and all the things that we know what we've seen by the Spirit of God, they know. But they're not trying to alarm the people. We don't want mass chaos. We want peace. But we're thankful for our security, right? So, look at the security. Meanwhile, the NYPD is stepping up security as it does each year. There are no specific threats, but police aren't taking any chances. For the first time this year, they're adding a second layer of screening. Revelers won't get screened just once, but twice. And one of the main security concerns, according to federal authorities, is the potential for vehicle rammings after last year's deadly terror attack in New Orleans. Eyewitness News reporter Darla Miles in Times Square with the latest. Darla: 'Well, Shirin and Joe, as you can see, thousands of people have already descended upon New York City. They are walking through Times Square, pretty much worry-free. None of them have a possible terrorist attack or security threat in mind. And the NYPD and the city of New York want to keep it that way. New Year's Eve in Times Square is one of the largest and the most complex public safety operations anywhere in the world.' New York City is locked in and ready to host millions of tourists planning to ring in 2026 in Times Square. Mayor Adams and NYPD Commissioner Jessica Tisch Tuesday morning holding a security briefing to reassure those revelers the festivities will be a virtual fortress with thousands of boots on the ground. It's what we're praying over. So here's another one. When I told you about the new mayor, he decided now he doesn't feel safe to do it in front of the public. So he's going to go downtown. He's going to go underground. Zohran Mamdani is taking the oath underground. I don't know if that's literal or whatever, but he's going to do his oath underground because he's afraid for his life. Mamdani ditches Times Square; will take mayoral oath underground, sworn in by Letitia James. While Times Square gets the confetti, New York's real power shift is happening underground. Mayor-elect Mamdani will be sworn in just before midnight on January 1st inside the abandoned Old City Hall subway station, a 1904 landmark sealed off since 1945. The oath will be administered by Attorney General Letitia James in a private ceremony far from flashing lights and corporate backdrops. The location is no accident. Mamdani is making his first move as mayor a statement: 'This city was built below street level by workers, engineers, and immigrants.' Taking the oath beneath City Hall signals exactly who he says New York belongs to. Mamdani, a Democratic Socialist who ran on fair-free buses, rent freezes, and aggressive transit investment, is tying his leadership to infrastructure. I just think it's interesting. Obviously, there's more to what's being said that's not being said. They're not trying to cause mass chaos. And so, thank God, they know how to keep things more secure and do the things they know how to do to keep us all safe. Heightened security plan for New York and National Guard deployed to New Orleans. Now, that's interesting. For New Year's Eve, the National Guard is deploying to New Orleans. This is another city the Lord showed us. The National Guard is being deployed to New Orleans. This is exactly the city we've been interceding for, unless there was a bunch of you that called and raised the alarm, like you did with the other one in Los Angeles, California, and you had thousands of people call. Maybe you did; I don't know. I just know this is interesting to me. I thought, 'Did Sister Clipboard call a thousand times to New Orleans?' Maybe, because I'm thinking they do. The National Guard is being deployed in New Orleans, so maybe Sister Clipboard called New Orleans too. I'm just telling y'all because I'm thinking that's very interesting. Two layers of security in New York and the National Guard being deployed in New Orleans for y'all. I thought she must have blown up the phone all day long. We didn't get a call about the National Guard in New Orleans, thank God, but I'm just thinking she was busy all day. Maybe she's like, 'We've got to call New Orleans. We're calling Beverly Hills. We're calling everybody today. Call your friends. Hide your wife, hide your kids. They're going crazy up in here, y'all. Hide your kids, hide your wives, hide your relatives.' Somebody said, 'Sister Clipboard, you're a busy girl.' You're a busy girl, Clipboard. She's tired. She says, 'I'm tired,' all thousand of you. I mean, God bless you if you took it. I know it's serious. I don't know, but I just think it's not a coincidence. I'm not trying to be funny; it's very serious. But I'm thinking, my goodness, look at this. Somebody said, 'Y'all gave her a job.' We gave Sister Clipboard a job. Oh my goodness, she is busy up in here. Seriously, it's crazy. The comments are funny, but it's not funny; it's very serious. Okay, go to the next. See what even Elon Musk said. This is an Elon Musk tweet, and Braden showed me this. I thought, 'Wow, look at what he's saying.' What we saw over there, the amount of money being sent to non-governmental organizations. But actually, this, by the way, is I think one of the biggest sources of fraud in the world: government-funded non-governmental organizations. This is a gigantic fraud loophole where the government can give money to an NGO, and then there are no controls over that NGO. So they've given billions of dollars—in fact, we estimate tens of billions of dollars—to NGOs that are essentially scams. What we saw over there... yeah. And then he gives a tweet, and it says, 'My lower bound guess for how much fraud there is nationally is 20% of the federal budget, which would mean 1.5 trillion per year, probably much higher.' $1.5 trillion of fraud, folks. That should make the American people... I can't even comprehend $1.5 trillion in fraud, is what Elon Musk says. He was appalled. Do you folks understand? These people are crooks. They should all be thrown in prison. That's crazy. Then we have the lady with the turban on her head, the Muslim lady, Omar. Thank you, baby. Omar smuggling $30 million into a fake account from what Benny Johnson said. They did the research on it, into a winery of over $30 million. She came into office with less than $1,000 to her name, was completely broke with $40,000 worth of student loans, and now her net worth is over $30 million, and she's been in office for less than four years. Did I say that? Did I say it good enough? Do you understand? In four years, she's made $30 million. She was $40,000 in debt when she took office. That should make people a little upset in Minnesota. That's mega fraud. Where do they put the money? And they all have it on there; they have the spreadsheets of what she said she filed for her company for this winery that she has. And it's some kind of satanic devil behind this winery bottle that she had and what she was doing. That should make the taxpayers furious. But I saw the bees coming up out of the ground circling her and the Lord said she's done. So let's see what happens with that. We see these things. But Braden shows me all these articles and it goes with everything the Lord has told us was coming even concerning 2026. And the Lord today, even with the things the Lord said today, it shook me. It shook me. He talked about the plague, ladies and gentlemen, today. And I've never experienced anything like that. And I'm not going to go into the depth of it because it's pretty private, some of the things the Lord said to us. It was to us in preparation for our ministry and what we're supposed to do. But in this, he kept saying there will be not a fatal wound to America, but a major wound. He said that the heads of the people have been stiffened up towards me. Can you read part of that? Yeah. Where you start with the cities, that part? I don't know. Let me see, because there's a lot—I did not want that out about them. There will be a wound inflicted. Okay, I'll find it. And he said because their heads are up towards me. He said, 'I will bring them to their knees and to my side by bringing them... humble their heads. I'm going to humble the heads. Will you grieve and turn to me?' He said, 'It will not be a fatal wound that you will see, but it will make you... will it make you come under me, or have you turned your back upon me? Will this wound that you're about to see turn you back to me to heal?' About a shaking... and he was telling when I saw in the vision, he said, 'The people have turned their heads up toward me so much and I'm done.' Basically, he said there will be a shaking. 'Their hearts are far from me.' Even the people of the church, our hearts are far from him. He says he's looking for wholeness, a humbleness to him. Humble yourself under me. As I saw the shaking coming, he spoke very greatly about these next three years. Because you have turned your face to me at one time, but now you have decided you have detached yourself from the vine, and a great shaking will bring you to your knees. But the wound that you will see will not be fatal, only if you don't bow your knee. If you don't bow your knee when you are grieving, what will you see? Will you turn back to me when this has been afflicted? Will you turn back to me? Will you bow your head low for what you're about to see? The very life you take for granted and the prosperity that I've given you will be shaken to its core. I bring you to my side, and a humbling you will see that will bring you to your knees. Then he said, 'You think they're coming after your crown jewel, your city that is a crown jewel to America, but they are planning to infiltrate the other cities. They are so focused on the crown jewel with your security and all that is taking place, but they have infiltrated your land.' He's talking about Iran, and he said, 'You're focused upon the crown jewel, which is New York City and Washington DC, but as I saw it, it was scattered upon the land. I saw Albuquerque, New Mexico. I saw San Antonio, Texas. I saw Oklahoma City, Oklahoma.' I saw Kansas. I saw spread to Seattle. I saw all these major cities that were spread throughout, and he said, 'They have infiltrated your land.' He talked to me and said, 'You must know prophetically who you're talking to and what audience is receiving it, for there are different words,' and he went over that again. I saw a cleft of the rock and Moses as he was hidden, and the Lord's backside passed and the glory came. He said, 'I sheltered Moses and I will shelter my remnant in the cleft of the rock. I will shelter you.' I saw a divot like a rock, and I saw a death angel—this demonic thing that looked like a black mist passed by. He said it was this way with the children of Israel: that when the blood was put on their doorpost, the death angel passed by. I saw a shaking of a plague coming again that was so bad. I don't know if I should go into the depth of that. I'm not here to cause you to fear; I'm here to prepare you. Most people go, 'Brandon, you try to scare the Jesus out of us.' I said, 'No, I don't. I'm trying to prepare you for what I've seen coming.' The Lord warned me of the next three years of a major shaking, a humbling of America, a humbling of things, an enemy within. I was taken out, and I saw China and Taiwan. I saw China waiting until we are afflicted. They all are in on this—a red dawn experience as America is preoccupied with herself. If you go back to the prophetic words in 2023 and 2024, I saw China waiting to infiltrate and take Taiwan as America is preoccupied with what's going on inside of her. They would like to wound the eagle to the point of no return. So then I saw them infiltrating, and I saw Ezekiel 38 and 39 upon Israel, waiting to strike Israel when America was preoccupied within itself. They had to get America out of the way. I saw a strategic plan coming; there was so much drama going on within our own borders that Taiwan was messed with and taken within three days. I saw a surrendering as China took over. Then I saw Israel being inflicted—Ezekiel 38 and 39. All of this was happening so quickly, but America was out because there was so much drama coming into America because of a Biden administration. The Lord kept telling me, 'You'll be so thankful, remnant, that you have Trump.' I'm not trying to exalt Trump above anybody. He is a man. I need you to understand that he is not God. But I believe that God has put his hand on Trump for such a time as this, and you will be so thankful in the days ahead that Trump is still here. We must pray for his security and for his safety at all times because the enemy would love to remove him. But we know that the hand of the Lord is watching over him. I'm so thankful that we have a great God that even in the midst of our prayers and us interceding for his children, for his wife, for our land—if my people who are called by my name will humble themselves and pray. But there is a remnant of people that he said, 'When this happens, I will hold you to me, Brandon, in the cleft of the rock.' I believe there's a lot of the remnant watching right now, all 5,000 of you, and the Lord said to me, 'There's a remnant, Brandon, and I will protect them.' I saw like a bubble of hedge around and about them of provision like we talked about last night on the broadcast. The Lord said, 'I will provide for you and there'll be a supernatural provision. Believe me for big.' I said, 'Lord, this goes different from what you said last night.' He said, 'Who's your audience? To whom is the word that I'm delivering through you? You're talking to the remnant versus the ones that are stiff-necked and have their heads up toward me.' Two different crowds. Do you qualify for the blessing? Do you qualify for the rock? Are you His? That's what you have to ask. Well, Brandon, this sounds totally different than last night. Yes, because it's to a different crowd. Do you hear me? I really want Sister Clipboard to hear me. I want you to hear me right now. It's to a different crowd. Don't email, 'Well, you're stirring up fear.' No, it's to a different crowd. I'm speaking to different people right now, and I don't want to come across cranky, but I have to get it across to you that some of you don't qualify for what's coming: the blessing and the judgment shaking. It's two different sides of a coin. It's very thin. What side are you on? Are you sold out to God? Does your heart belong to Him? Is your heart His or is there a mixture in you? Are you so much in the world that you're a Lot in the midst of Sodom and Gomorrah, and you don't even realize that Abraham's up there interceding for you on the hilltop saying, 'Listen, please get them out, angels! Please, Lord, have mercy!' And he's saying, 'I'll let you get your relatives out.' Listen to me. Lot didn't know what was coming. He only knew because of Abraham's prayers. And there are many of you right now that are Abrahams standing on the hillside praying for your relatives, praying for the family, and they don't know what's coming. I know there's a lot of you that are awake. I know I have a lot of seasoned prayer warriors on this channel watching even right now, and you're up in the middle of the night interceding at almost 11 o'clock at night, Central Time. You know there's an urgency in the hour concerning New Year's Eve, an urgency in the hour concerning plagues and famine and destructive things. You have that inward alarm going off inside of you going, 'Alert, alert, alert.' That's why you take this so seriously and you're praying at this time of night. But there are a lot of people who don't know what's coming. The Lord said to me, 'I will shelter my remnant.' Are you part of the remnant? I have to ask you that because whenever he showed me this—as I spoke, the Lord said, 'Say it.' As I spoke it, I delivered this word as I was driving, and this black thing that looked like a mist formed in the car. It was a sign. And the Lord said, 'As I spoke the prophetic word out of my mouth, it manifested on my flesh.' I've never felt anything like that before in my life. It shook me. I won't go into the detail of what I felt, but the Lord said it was a glimpse. Woe unto you who have hidden sin in your life. Woe unto you! There is coming a shaking to the church like you would not believe. Judgment begins in the house of the Lord first. And the Lord specifically said to me, 'I'm hiding my remnant, Brandon,' and I saw a dome like a shield on an astronaut—a shield was covered, and I saw it pass by. He brought it like it was with the plagues of Egypt when the death angel passed by for the firstborn. I'm not saying that it will be about your firstborn, but it was a type and shadow of something that is coming. And I saw the remnant protected. I saw a shaking to awakening like you would not believe again for a major revival and all the things. And it shook me. This word shook me. I felt a shaking inside of myself. He said, 'Humble yourself underneath the mighty hand of God. If you don't humble yourself, He will humble you.' And America, he said, 'You have been weighed in the balance and you have been found lacking.' He said this to me and he said, 'A shaking's coming from your land, and you'll be so thankful that you have Trump.' I saw he said a wound will be inflicted but it will not be fatal, but I saw a stiff-necked people that their heads were bowed low afterwards, and I saw their heads bowed down before the Father in humility. He said, 'I have made you basically the crown jewel of the world other than Israel.' But I saw America was the envy of the world. He said, 'I've blessed you above all the nations. I've prospered you. I've blessed you. I've had my hand on you because of your founding fathers. But as a nation as a whole, you've turned your back upon me and your nose is up toward me. Woe, America,' he said. 'But there is a remnant of you that I will shelter.' And I saw a humbling coming. I saw a great shaking coming. It was heavy, wasn't it? It's heavy to say it again. And he said, 'Woe to the prophetic voices that have spoken to itching ears, for too much is given, much is required.' And he said to me, 'Do not be like the prophets in Jeremiah's time. Brandon, say the things that are hard, even if you're saying it alone. For there are many men and women that have become like those in Jeremiah's time, and they're not delivering the words that I've told them. They have an ear that is trying to speak to itching ears.' And he said, 'This is a type and shadow of what happened in Jeremiah's time.' He was so angry in his voice tone. It shook me. I told D, 'I feel like I'm going to be melted.' After it was over, I was trembling about the prophetic voices. He compared them to the prophets of Jeremiah's time. He told me, 'They're not hearing me. Say the hard things.' Oh, Brandon, that seems so prideful, all the things you're saying. Who do you think you are? I'm just a man that has been told to say certain things that are very hard for me to say, but I fear God, not you. And if you don't watch me anymore, goodbye. I don't care. I'm trying to warn you what the Father has told me to warn you tonight. In the next three years, things will accelerate like you are not going to believe. I don't know what it is about this next three, but he specifically said as of tomorrow, in the next 24 hours, things will accelerate. It was such a strong word, wasn't it, love? As we were writing it down, Braden, the whole atmosphere of the car was charged. It was on me for hours afterwards; a mantle of the prophetic was on me so strong. I told her, 'When that comes on like that, I could see the shaking coming to the nations.' Have I delivered it, Babe? Baby, yes. I need your help. He said the heartland will even be shaken. He said even the heartland—say some of this—he said for even they said terror in the heartland would be more sufficient than even the crown jewel. I could hear the terrorists talking. I could hear Iran talking. And they wanted to inflict fear upon our land. They said, 'It's time to get the ball rolling. It's time to implement what we know.' They got their commands. So we pray for the lands. I'm hearing some chatter. I'm hearing generals talk. It was very heavy. So we pray for Homeland Security. We pray for the FBI. We pray for our people. But the plague—I saw this black plague of death. It looked like a mist again. But it looked kind of like the Grim Reaper. It was tattered black, like sackcloth, like the fabric that is linen. It looked like black linen that was tattered, this black being that I saw. It looked like something out of a Halloween thing. And as it moved across, I saw it and it was released. I'm telling you, it was demonic. It looked scary. It was released. It looked like black gauze moving. And I stopped and I froze. In fact, I told her it was everything I could do not to get sick all over the car. The moment I spoke it and saw it and went into the spirit, I could see this—it was like black gauze. I told her, 'What is this?' and all of a sudden, I went into this travail and I almost vomited all over the car. I told her, 'I feel sick. I have to stop.' All of a sudden, I don't know how to describe what happened because it's never happened before. I pray it never happens again. It went from my esophagus to my stomach—whatever this was. The Lord let me have a glimpse of it. I said, 'What is this?' But the Lord allowed me to see something I never wanted to see again. It was terrible. He said they will believe it's Ichabod. They believe it, but I've never left you and never forsaken you. This is a humbling. He kept saying, 'This is a humbling.' There's no urgency. Thank you, Holy Ghost. He said, 'There's no urgency in my church. There's no urgency behind the pulpits that the coming of my Son is at hand. From sea to shining sea all around this world, there's not enough urgency, for I am coming swiftly.' And this will bring forth the urgency that is required for what you're about to see. That's what he said. There's no urgency. People said, 'Well, you're yelling.' Yes, because he was yelling. Get over it. You're too wimpy. You don't have a backbone. And for what's coming, you're going to get a backbone. You've got a bunch of spineless, skinny-jeans, and fog-machine people up in here, and you're going to get a backbone or you're going to fall away. The great falling away is coming. You're going to go, 'Oh, dear God, what did I truly believe?' Christianity today is weak. You come against hard times, you come against things, and you think God's abandoning you. Most people couldn't live half of what I've lived. My life has been hard. But every single time, I always stay on God's side. Oh, Brandon, what have you been through? You don't even have a clue. I've given you a little glimpse into our life. Most of you walk on cupcakes and rainbows compared to what it takes to be refined. I walk a very tightrope. That's why I stay to myself. I told D, I feel I would be more reclusive than I've ever been. I feel I should just do this and be reclusive. I don't want anybody in my circle. Stay away from me because I want to hear him. That's how serious these things are right now. This is not church as usual. This is church unusual. And the church is going to wake up, folks. 'Well, I've heard you say that.' Oh, woe unto you who mock. I pray you make it through the storm that's coming. I've never heard him speak the way he's been speaking. It's different, isn't it? As he shows me the faces of the prophetic people, he's disgusted. He said, 'They're a stench before my nose. They truly believe they're hearing me. They truly believe they're speaking for me.' And he said, 'They're far from me.' He said, 'They're a stench before me, for they're not warning my people of the signs of the times. They're giving itching-ear prophecies.' It was a very strong word. I said I need somebody to judge this word. I was sitting there, I didn't know who to call because most of them don't want to hear it. I was shook. I was waiting for it. When you were there, I felt the atmosphere and I listened to him. As I'm driving down the road and I'm praying in the spirit over the city, I have such an urgency today. And I told her, 'Something is going on.' When Father spoke, He shook our car. He shook me. It's pages long: instruction for our ministry, instruction for the days ahead. I deliver it with a heavy heart. I deliver it with awe, fear, and reverence to Him. Did I say enough? You're the only ones that can help me. What do you think? Did I deliver enough? He said, 'We strike in the finances.' He talked about finances, natural disasters, politics, and war. But He said He would humble people to their knees and, at the same time, He said their heads will bow before Him. He said, 'Your heads are stuck up towards Me, but when these things take place, their heads will bow before Me.' That's what He said. They will no longer be stuck up; they will be down.
